channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: spaceX IPO — 348 replies — 1392.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
spaceX IPO

Open thread • Replies: 348 • Updated: 2026-06-12 20:28 UTC

OP

are we ready for the biggest scam in history of histories?

ELON MUSK, YOU FAGGGOT

when will your ponzi scheme finally collapse, you fucking hobo

Early replies (first 3)

62351469
>>62351461
like 8 different brokers and crypto apps have shilled this shit to me fucking lmao

are they gonna rape retail instantly or let it pump for a few days before the raping?

62351500
It's actually going to be a repeat of the ICP ico isn't it?

62351509
>>62351469
>are they gonna rape retail instantly or let it pump for a few days before the raping?
supposedly this is entering indexes in 15 days

total scam of scams. can't believe this is fucking happening. everyone (ameriburgers) about to get raped

i'm not american but I would've voted for the faggot. but this...
it would've either been: continuation of woke lunacy or scams

hard times
>https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=AEB6ibtdPZc

>are they gonna
the cult is real. it will pump and potentially crater with ai bust in 6-12 months (or god knows when or if)

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62359339
>>62358861
This is along the same line of argument as "B-but TSLA is the market cap of all car companies combined!".

Kek

62359356
>>62351461
I put in for £20k's worth and only managed to nab just over £5k's worth.

62359359
>>62359339
i will take the cybercab to the asian massage parlour with my spacex profits in the future. thanks elon

62359369
>>62359249
Anon, wake up. It's 2026. Nobody gives a shit about worms. All the cool kids are getting their own nuclear reactors and they can build them wherever they want. If you run out of land, you can just take it from someone else.

62359372
>>62359356
you got lucky actually
anyways how did you even lift 20,000 pounds?

62359390
>>62359369
it was never about the worms, its so bureaucrats and "consultants" can make busy work for themselves and feel a little rush from the power of delaying everything by years to get paid. parasites

62359442
>>62359258
Source?

62359498
>>62357919
Better than I thought, but you're still paying $5-6m to orbit a "datacenter" that's about 170x H100s of compute. With no way to upgrade or sell the HW as it ages out. The self-contained off-coast ones seem more plausible.

62359515
>>62359390
Hold the spaceX bag, that will show those damn bureaucrats

62359532
>>62359442
They have a lot of intel on the matter over in /GME/ You should go ask them. >>62350482
They have been keeping close tabs on this. They call it "The Cusip Conundrum". BBBYQ CUSIP keeps showing up on securities not associated with BBBYQ,

62359598
>>62359339
tesla stock hasnt change much in the last 4 years or so? why exactly is it worth that much? p/e ratio is at over 300

62359635
>>62359598
humanoid robots and robot cars and hype

62359672
>>62359532
I googled the cusip number of both and its not the same. Its
84615Q103 for SpaceX and BBBYQ is 075896100.
What are you making stuff up for?

62359677
>>62359598
I think of it like a wildcat bank

62359688
>>62359635
waymo has been operating robotaxi fleets in multiple cities for half a decade now and china organizes marathons for robots that also know kung fu? not sure tesla is at that level yet. i guess it's just hype then.

62359727
>>62359688
waymo doesn't make cars, that's part of why it costs more to ride in a waymo than an uber. tesla will make the cars, and be cheaper than taking an uber. chinese robots don't have proper hands and nobody needs a robot to do kung fu.

62359830
>>62359672
What's going on with the cusip?

62359840
>>62359727
If tesla can pull off self-driving cars why can't uber

62359901
>>62359840
uber doesn't make cars

62359929
>>62359727
>chinese
zoomers and boomers are totally mindbroken by Chyna
literally falling for potemkin propaganda

62359935
>>62359901
We have been making cars for over 100 years now, the sauce isn't in the car, it's your sensors, software and compute.

62359936
>>62359929
i like china, but they are a competitor

62359956
>>62359935
uber hasn't been making cars
very few companies in the us can make cars at scale. very few founded in recent decades. and once tesla cars are self driving they've already said they won't keep selling them because they'll make more money renting them out. so uber will have to buy the cars and the sensors and the compute, all things tesla makes themselves and uber will have to buy. guess who will be able to offer a cheaper ride and get most of the customers?

62359996
>>62359956
>guess who will be able to offer a cheaper ride and get most of the customers
Waymo !!

62360009
>>62359372
I sold a bunch of stocks a month or so ago and have been looking for new places to invest.
Will probably stick some in Anthropic next.

62360020
>>62359598
Because the market is fake and gay and you just have to guess which stocks they're eventually going to pump to the moon.
Don't look for sense.

62360023
>>62359996
but they don't make their own cars. cars are expensive. they have to buy cars from someone else and that someone else has to make a profit. the cost to produce a cybercar, an already cheaper car even with the self driving stuff, is much less than the cost for waymo to buy a car someone else made and then buy all the sensors and compute someone else and needs to profit from. its not complicated.

>>62360009
same. hopefully i actually get some pre ipo this time

62360380
I trust the CEO of SpaceX to take us to the Moon.

62360501
>>62359830
You said they were the same, and they're not. So why are you lying?

62360569
>>62358152

Look, here is a main reason im not on team Elon and im not republican, i just cant handle these morons. You connect data center that is under ocean with you sollar arrays in the desert with electrical wire. There it is, problem solved, now explain what would orbital data center do if pierced with dust size cosmic object or when radiation will degrade the transistors or singe solar storm will fuck up the solar array, permanently fucking up the rig? And this is why Elon, who knows all this shit and genuinely genius level entrepreneur, cant win my heart - he is a scammer surrounded by morons.

item.title: SWIFT confirms Chainlink as the bedrock of their systems — 74 replies — 296.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
SWIFT confirms Chainlink as the bedrock of their systems

Open thread • Replies: 74 • Updated: 2026-06-12 20:31 UTC

OP

Kek fudniggers

Early replies (first 3)

62354945
>Inb4 source
https://www.icmagroup.org/assets/documents/Regulatory/Repo/ICMA-report-DLT-and-repo-part-I-June-2026-040626.pdf

62354971
it's all so tiring
i have sold much more of my stack than i wanted assuming that price would react by now

62354976
>>62354943
Cool, when will I be rich?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62357734
>>62356178
He asked

62357861
>>62357734
and you answered
in a cringey pathetic whiney desperate way
but you answered

62357965
As a Link holder please get close with Jesus Christ. Because shits about to get insane.

62358109
>>62354943
token...NEEDED?

62358124
>>62357965
yes, Lord Jesus can help guide you through your life of pain, suffering, and poverty

62358239
>>62356084
>iTs oNly fOr mEsSaGiNg

Under cover xerper.

62358599
>right about absolutely EVERYTHING except price
lol, lmao even

62358645
>>62355125
It's almost like Sirgay orchestrates repeated announcements of "partnerships" that mean nothing for token holders every single time but cause retarded retail hype in the front end which he then sells into because big names are attached..oh wait no that's exactly what happens repeatedly and without exception.

62358698
>>62354943
>>62355051
>>62355053
>>62355059
I'm almost 100% sure that I've seen this thread before, with the exact same responses.

62358755
>>62356084
KA BOOOOOOM

62358774
As expected.

XRP not needed.

62358895
>>62358645
retard

62359325
>>62354943
Check the chart for the crypto token LINK please

62359435
>>62355583
Lmao I remember you

62359438
>>62358698
this
linkies live in the groundhog day movie

62359501
Just read through OP’s document and it looks like we are going to get everything we ever wanted. I don’t really feel anything. I have gone through so much turmoil and learning while holding this damned token that I don’t recognize myself anymore. All I know is that Jesus Christ is the way, the life, and the truth

62359757
>>62357965
supremely based

62359779
>>62359325
done, now what?

62359913
>>62355034
>When clarity act allows staking pools to expand,

bahahahhaha

bro what current regulation out there right now says you can have a staking pool but it can't grow?

what specific provision in the proposed clarity act is it that you think saves your special altcoin?


how are people still falling for this

62359988
>>62359501
>I have gone through so much turmoil

look at this kid talking about how hard it was to sit at a computer and read buzz words
your grandfather would be disgusted

> and learning while holding this damned token

bro you haven't learned shit, except that a fool and his money are soon parted

62360040
>>62359988
yes link marines like to pretend they are on the samurai warrior's mystical journey of self-discovery or something lmao

62360066
>>62354976
When the "antichrist" system comes into effect, I guess.
Assuming you survive whatever they have planned between now and then.

62360120
>>62360040
yeah it's pathetic


i would pay to see some of these boyscouts give a live presentation in their own words about one of those infographics like the one in op.
the chainlink boyscout revels in the fact that their cult investment comes off as so high iq that no one can understand it, including themselves if they're being honest.

the position for them is essentially a vanity hold, where they can fantasize about the day they show the world their misunderstood, off the charts intelligence. the problem is of course, that day isn't real

their hubris has been quite costly over the years

62360137
>>62359988
>>62360040
Ill pray for you two (probably one person on multiple ID’s)

62360230
>>62360137
we don't need your prayers stinkbag
we're doing just fine in the material realm without the assistance of your supposed "son of God" who was born in "immaculate conception" (lmao cope for Mary being a whore)

62360247
>>62355053
Three more years.... then my real life can begin

62360331
>>62360230
Im praying still

62360405
>>62360331
well stop

62360577
>>62355053
Yjk this nigger typed 2 more years but decided to throw an extra year in there because it would be too on the nose. Evil fucking nigger kek

62360584
>>62355583
>Flat feet bug gf poster is back
>Link down another -30% since
Sorry bro you better get used to the flapjack feets

item.title: So far this year, I've lost 23k betting on Nintendo. — 50 replies — 200.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
So far this year, I've lost 23k betting on Nintendo.

Open thread • Replies: 50 • Updated: 2026-06-12 20:24 UTC

OP

So far this year, I've lost 23k betting on Nintendo. How the fuck is it legal for them to destroy so much shareholder value? I WANT MY FUCKING MONEY BACK NOW!!

Early replies (first 3)

62348099
>>62348037
You did not lose anything, shoe shine boy. change your diapers and calm the FUCK down. Because you didn't sell yet. Right?

62348149
Better price to buy m8. You don't believe in the business anymore or somethin

62348170
If you couldn't tell the vidya industry is dead, I don't know what to tell you.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62350816
>>62348037
Did you use the Switch 2 for a bunch of hours? Yes? So you saw a device with a 2-hour battery life and no games, but you still decided to go all-in on this company?

62350869
Nintendo used to put out sub par hardware that still managed to be hugely successful in the console wars, they had the handheld market cornered, 3ds was kino. How the decision to kill and eat Gameboy with a retarded tablet console got through will always be perplexing to me.

62350907
>>62350816
Ouch. Released in 2025. That caused it to dump. No wonder that bull run was so short. Nintendo bull runs usually last over a year and don't go down that fast. I think this company is recoverable but I do not know what they plan on doing to make better products. Will this be like HP and Ubisoft being shit and making bad decisions until they get a new CEO and clean house? Scratch that. Forgot what was going on at Ubisoft that made me 2nd guess buying.

62351015
Oh now I know why I didn't invest in Ubisoft is because the different ticker types were too confusing. That on top of shady incompetence going on right now.

62351629
stop buying with emotions and hopes
rape these companies like they would rape you

gaming companies at release you always short. even TTWO

62351972
>>62348037
Why are chinks like this?

62352012
>>62350907
Switch 2 is probably just a transition console before their next gimmick, like the 3DS or Wii U. Still, it could have been done much better.

62352040
>>62348263
Travis Scott had a concert in Fortnite.

62352596
>>62352012
This is always part of the problem with investing in companies normies have heard of and are emotional. I am beginning to preferer investing in reindustrialization. But videogame companies sure are damn fun to invest in from the looks of it. I was getting bored to death looking up the next best machinery parts company to invest in. Too poor to invest in all of them that aren't complete shit or too high and hope for the best. Have to really narrow it down to a few at some point. Very tedious. Especially for an average retail fag. But Nintendo and Ubisoft I can afford multiple shares.

62352642
>>62349809
Lol. Not if you just keep holding, idiot. But that's what you get for investing in bing bing wahoo slop.

62352731
>>62350352
I don't know Apple had a big ass rebound thanks to Steve Jobs. Long history old companies having a comeback after years if not decades of mismanagement.

62354514
>>62350703
This is the conundrum of just recently getting enough money to theoretically invest in something because you're a zoomer. Tech has been pumped to hell and back already and the risk of buying in now and winding up near the top is worse than just letting inflation eat into savings.
It might continue going for years to come I'm aware but there's no way this is sustainable without a crash at some point.

62354552
>>62348177
Switch 2 is the best selling console and selling at faster pace than Switch 1, the upcoming games like new Ocarina of Time, CoD, Pokemon wind/waves are going to push the console hard

62354555
>>62354514
Millennial. I haven't been keeping up with what is going on the video game industry lately. Because I hardly play anymore. The thing is researching machine parts companies is tedious. Nintendo and Ubisoft are practically rock bottom low and easier to understand what they do. Already made money off of mining stocks. Just a smart poor fag being a poor fag carefully picking out what to invest in. Because I can't invest in everything I want to on my wishlist.

62354579
>>62352012
They ran out of feasible gimmicks that's why it's been the same shit repackaged since wiiU

62354587
Hahaha, are you the fucking retard that shilled them before the direct?
Classic!

62354609
I'm buying at this level, thanks for helping me fill my position bro

62357401
>>62354552
people have lost their creativity. nothing new like these classics come out, only slop using the brand of something people recognize but no one out there creating new zeldas and pokemons

62357443
>>62348037
Nintendo is sitting on an assload of cash. they don't care about shareholders.

62360010
>>62348170
Nintendo is going to continue doing well, but it was overpriced before.
Videogames are not a dying industry, they are just no longer a growth industry. The reason gaming used to seem like an amazing investment oportunity until recently was that there were way more people going into the hobby than going out and the first big generations of gamers were hitting their mid/late 30s when earnings start peaking. It didn't matter whether game companies were good or not because the gaming pie was growing so fast that their slice would grow too.
Now that gaming is as normiefied as it gets and there are adult gamers of all ages, the pie is not growing anymore and companies have to actually be good businesses if they want to survive and grow. That's why companies that were already known for a decade to be shit like Ubisoft seem to be imploding all of a sudden.

62360025
>>62349964
Now look at the 5 year returns for Advantest and Tokyo Electron and say that again.

62360035
>>62350352
>>all good games are made by indie developers
>why would you bet on any of the big companies? they are creatively bankrupt bloated bureaucracies
Even if most good games are made by smaller developers nowadays, most actual money printing game franchises that actually move the needle when it comes to investing are still big corporate IPs.

62360245
>>62360010
This is one of the reasons why I am hesitant to invest in gaming. Feels like I would be ripping off young first time investors who pump those stocks when a popular game comes out. Like OP. Anything industrial it is often boomers who died of old age bag holding before their relatives could retrieve their stock portfolios at the right time. Or they do retrieve a whale's when it is crabbing and there is a dip to be had. I get less guilt on my conscious screwing over a Boomer than a Zoomer.

62360284
>>62360245
Zoomers are getting cocky and obnoxious, acting like concepts they come up with haven't ever been heard of and tried before. I await the day for the alphas to grow up and shit all over them.

62360459
>>62360284
Still better than Boomers and gen X ever were. And that is saying something. I have more in common with Zoomer 20 years younger than me than a lead maxed gen X who is 10 years older. Very refreshing to have lots more people to talk to without the lead brain damage. Haven't heard as many good ideas circulating widely until they grew up.

Seriously Gen X were scum who often didn't even give a shit their own kids needed to be potty trained until a kindergarten teacher told them they needed to be. Most of whom were totally normal kids of average intelligence they neglected that badly when it came to teaching them everyday things. This is who were most of the Zoomers parents. They could have turned out better if it weren't for that. Every other generation was horrified by 4 year olds still in diapers. They really didn't care like a drugged out hippy until the kid was old enough to go to public school.

62360515
>>62348037
No one guys Nintenslop anymore. Millennials are the last generation that cares about it, but are ageing out of gaming now.

62360525
You shouldnt buy a stock unless you plan on keeping it for 5 to 10 years

62360531
>>62360459
That's cool and all, but those fags will die off soon, and then they'll just end up shifting blame to kikes or anyone else besides themselves. Not to mention this faggy generation is just as tech illiterate and censorious as the boomers they bitch about.

62360534
0 mainline heavy hitters yet. Metroid was in dev hell for a decade.

62360549
>>62348278
>They are getting cooked by real handhelds now and I’m going to be buying another handheld isn’t a switch for my son.
Such as? The steam deck is now overpriced and other handheld PCs are even more expensive for similar offerings. So you're buying your son a system that's at least 2-3 more expensive than Nintendo's gaming system to play kid games that are available on every platform and even phones.... kek what a tard

item.title: ELON MUSK: WORLDS FIRST TRILLIONAIRE — 23 replies — 92.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
ELON MUSK: WORLDS FIRST TRILLIONAIRE

Open thread • Replies: 23 • Updated: 2026-06-12 20:31 UTC

OP

HONESTLY? HE DESERVES IT! GO ELON!

Early replies (first 3)

62358719
>>62358700
Yes he deserves it

62358727
Capitalism has WON. Sharers are in shambles

62358733
>>62358700
Africa can't stop winning

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62358737
>>62358700
NOOOOO SAAAR FIRST TRILLIONAIRE MUST BE INDIAN SAAAAAAAAR INDIAN NUMBER ONE SUPERPOWER 2030!

62358749
>>62358700
Yes, but it breaks my ashkenazi heart so fucking much thinking about that his most beloved Her Epstein won't be there to celebrate with him. He always looked up to as a father more than to his own goyim father.
He won, ah vey, but at what price...

62358768
>>62358700
South africans are superior!

62358770
>>62358700
pure african genetics excellency

62358901
>>62358700
Congratulations Spaceman.

62358928
>>62358700
He's based for putting a man on mars thoughbeit

62358929
>>62358768
Africa has won and America has lost.

62358936
>>62358700
Do you know he cant sell his shares without collapsing the price?

62358976
>>62358700
African kings stay winning.

62359020
(girls FTW!)

62359160
Hecking Elon having a million million dollars! Go Elon! I just woke up from a coma since 2016 and Im a redditor. We still love him, right?

>>62358936
Bro the market cap has gone up 40% since the IPO launch he can sell however many he wants. But he wont because he believes itll keep going up

62359203
On paper at least, yeah? Or is he pocketing all the company money?

62359243
>>62358700
1 trillionaire but hes still an old man and empty inside now

62359285
nah fuck that guy

62359419
>>62358700
Actual cancer on humanity

62359447
>>62358936
This. If you don't have 1 trillion USD in your checking account you aren't a trillionaire.

62360476
>>62359447
did you jsut learn what net wroth means or something genius?

62360566
there shouldn't even be a trillion dollars

62360576
>>62360566
Checked and yes. Some day there won't be.

62360590
I'm surprised I haven't heard the "has same combined wealth as the bottom x,xxx,xxx,xxx humans" figure yet.

item.title: >DUDE JUST BUY A HOUSE LMAO what if your corrupt local government approves several AI data centers and they get built 10… — 23 replies — 73.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
>DUDE JUST BUY A HOUSE LMAO what if your corrupt local government approves several AI data centers and they get built 10…

Open thread • Replies: 23 • Updated: 2026-06-12 20:15 UTC

OP

>DUDE JUST BUY A HOUSE LMAO
what if your corrupt local government approves several AI data centers and they get built 100 feet away from your house? why would i want to risk this?
>THAT WILL NEVER HAPPEN
it's happening all over the US.

Early replies (first 3)

62358792
>don't buy a house!!
>what if someone builds a wearhouse and puts gpus inside of it!!!
really retard?

62358798
>>62358792
the "what if" could be extended to any number of scenarios.
>halfway house gets built next door
>neighbor turns his SFH into a section ape rental

62358803
>>62358792
>>62358798
also the word is "warehouse" you 60 IQ simian niggerbeast.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62358885
It's pretty fucking suspicious that they're all built around DC. There's nothing good about DC. And definitely nothing that would make someone want to do business in the area.

62358947
>>62358885
Suprising too since the ecelebs gravitate to places where up times on internet speeds are good becuase they are near those mega routers.
florida and the west.
Dc probably has some mega routers.
near wall street as well . Which some people get close to mega routers so they get slight advantage on trading
Also not to mention how much the military will be using said data centersc
Also big backlash about datacenters keeping them close to dc means they can deploy natty guard.

62359009
>>62358885
>There's nothing good about DC. And definitely nothing that would make someone want to do business in the area.

As someone who lives and works in DC, you're fucking retarded lil gup.

62359049
>>62358781
Nigga, space lauchpads are the new meme!

62359055
>>62358781
Texas is so Cucked. Water and the energy grid are already wrecked here

62359072
>>62359055
free market forces will fix it, ese.

62359311
I wish data centers got built but nimbys too strong

That tax rev too good
>but muh water bill
Oh no! My 40$ water bill will be 60$

62359330
New england chads rise up

62359374
>>62358792
they are loud and take resources from everyone around them. the power grid and water supply are not infinite

62359386
>>62359311
these data centers are getting multi year tax abatements. and when those abatements run out, you need to be literally retarded to think that local government will lower individual income taxes to offset the pickup in business taxes. it has literally never, EVER happened.

62359398
>>62358803
>he doesn't know about Gun's Wearhouse
ngmi

62359460
>>62359386
I live in the free world so my income tax is already 0

62359499
>>62359460
here you >>62359311 gleefully dream about increased tax revenues while apparently paying nothing, leading me to believe you're a poverty stricken white nigger on gibs.

62359743
>>62358781
importing a million indians at each blue dot

62359751
Get fucked! Ai is the future

62359755
>>62358781
>oh no, major corporate industrial investment in my local area that could create a lot of jobs, this is terrible!
t. retired boomers who don't care if shitty retail jobs and meth labs are the only sources of employment for the younger generations

62359791
>>62359499
Kys chang you will never be leader in ai

62359886
>>62359755
i lived in northeastern PA during the marcellus shale "boom." most of the jobs went to out of state workers and, 15 years later, all that's left of the "boom" in my hometown is poisoned wells and a few 3 story hotels that are owned by indians. if you still believe in the industrial job creation meme in the year 1980+46 you are literally retarded.

62360158
>>62359886
My PA mountain house land gets me 100k a year through fracking and I only go there to hunt a couple times a year. Thanks for playing sweety

62360489
>>62360158
limp wristed LARP tell. fracking is a process, not a metric on which royalties are paid. i know this because my parents are paid monthly royalties on a well that sits on their property. they also decrease hyperbolically (the well is re-worked) and so most people (including my parents) are getting basically nothing these days. last time they mentioned it to me, it was something like $100 a month.

item.title: How will this affect South Koreas economy? — 23 replies — 67.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
How will this affect South Koreas economy?

Open thread • Replies: 23 • Updated: 2026-06-12 20:13 UTC

OP

How will this affect South Koreas economy?

Should I go all-in on a SK index fund?

Early replies (first 3)

62350030
>>62349989
I like that he recognizes bald suffering, but the issue is mostly rampant feminism, so effectively, he is an enabler.

62350349
>>62349989
by shaving you no longer have to worry about styling your hair and it's a repellent for nasty and bad women

62350516
>>62350349
>just bend over and let the norwood reaper fuck you in the ass

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62350557
in the usa you should be able to pay for finasteride and minoxidil with an HSA. hair is protection from skin cancer.

62350562
>>62350349
You dont look like a 90s skinhead, you skinnyfat onions baldy.

62350565
>>62350557
Almost everywhere in the world generic finasteride options cost like $20-30 for an entire years supply.

Are the pharma companies scamming burgers by overcharging finasteride like they do with most other meds?

62350592
Baldy, baldy over there...

62350594
>>62350565
Except fin is a tranny drug poison. Post finasteride syndrome reddit has 15k unique weekly visits.

62350624
>>62350594
About 20% of men between 18-35 (who arent on fin) develop ED.

When people who do take fin develop ED, of course the drug that nukes users dicks (temporarily) 1% of the time is what they'll blame it on, while in reality it's something else entirely. I'd bet the number of finasteride users who develop permanent ED is pretty close to 20%, the same percentage as men who don't use it.

62350707
>>62349989
Just make it socially acceptable to wear hats everywhere. I am balding and I just wear a hat all the time and I was still able to get laid. Basically by the time I make it to the point the hat comes off it is too late and the sex happens anyway. I'd imagine this is what it is like when trans women trick straight men into bed with them.

62350754
>>62350707

62350920
>>62349989
attractive men = baby boom

62351695
mandatory plastic surgery
everyone looks like kpop
big orgy ensues

62351707
>>62350594
Finasteride has a half life of 6 hours and PFS is a fake condition invented by American grifters and bald cucks.

62351757
>>62349989
good work mr president, that outta improve the birth rate

62352443
>>62350565
20 a year? I pay 9 a month
t. eufag

62352757
>>62352443
I’m eu too and I get a 98-pack of 5mg for about €35. Split the 5mg into 4 pieces and you have 392 doses.

Never heard of anyone actually being prescribed individual 1mg tablets here. Pretty much all doctors prescribe the 5mg option and tell them to split it in 4

62352787
>>62350565
no, it is also cheap in the US. it’s just annoying that you can’t buy it with an HSA. it’s also annoying that you need a prescription. should be OTC.

62355508
>>62350624
>>62351707
Literally everyone develops watery semen on it, have fun taking that poison that will fuck you up after some years, instead of just getting a toupe.

62355814
>>62355508
I've taken it for 4 years and never experienced that. Looked it up now and in clinical trials it was a side-effect that hit about 3% of users, and which went back to normal when they discontinued usage.

Tens of millions of men are on finasteride and like 95% of guys who go on the internet to talk about it are doing so because they had negative effects from it and need advice. It's like going to a subreddit about sexual assault and assuming that just because 90% of the people posting there got raped means that 90% of people in real life have been raped as well, when that is obviously far from true

62355979
>>62350349
*repellent for all women

62356219
The mistake most men make when jumping on finasteride is not getting their testosterone and DHT levels checked first. Since using a drug that nukes your DHT while having low T and by extension low DHT is a recipe for disaster.

Like 20% of men between 18-35 have clinically low T (under 300ng/dl) that warrants medical treatment. Up to 30% are in the danger zone (under 350ng/dl) with mild symptoms of low T. Any doctor who prescribes finasteride to these people and nuking their DHT levels even further deserve to lose their license for malpractice

62360477
>>62349989
>free hair transplants
>free lefort / bimax surgery
>free limb lengthening
>free boobjobs
>free rhinoplasty
>free miscellaneous cosmetic surgery
Honestly not a bad solution to a dying fertility rate

OP

>BAM BAM BAM
>STAB STAB STAB
W-WHY AM I DYING I AM RICH AND HAVE MONEY ROCKETS CARS AIEEEEEE
P-PLEASE SIRE SAVE M-
>BAM BAM BAM
NOOOO WHY IS MONEY USELESS WHY WHY WHY WAAAAH PLEASE SIR
I WILL GIVE YOU EVERYTHIN-
>STAB HIS KIDS
AAAAAAH MY KIDDIES MY BLOODLINE WHY WHY
PLEASE SIR THE TRILLION MONEY
ACK

Early replies (first 3)

62359354
>>62359336
a mentally buck busted normie is going to say """the law""" grants the rich physical immunity.... and even if it doesn't, they have like, body guards who are omnipotent, omniscient, and omnipresent. you can't do ANYTHING to the rich!!!! it's literally impossible!!!!!

62359360
>>62359336
We live in capitalism and I'm protected by the pigs u need to learn how to move nigga

62359387

>/biz/

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62359400
>>62359336
thats cute but these rich tech geeks LITERALLY have 100M security details lol

they can hire a small army of 10 thousand well trained army people to protect them from your shitty little knife and pistol nigger

62359403
>>62359387
the weak should fear the strong. this is natural.

62359417
>>62359403
Then you should be very fearful
You aren't even aware of the monsters clutching at your very soul

62359427
>>62359336
Jeet cope. You are nobody in no man's land.

62359451
>>62359417
real life isn't one of your homoerotic fantasy novels. these tech losers venture into the real world. they don't always hide behind kevlar or lexan. their security details are sparse and irregular. anyone can reach out and touch them by conventional means. just last year some guy recorded of video of that sweaty ugly sodomite thiel being harassed on the streets of some country in western europe. how many close calls has zognald had?

62359453
>>62359336
You won't do shit timmy

62359479

62359496
>>62359360

>bows to cartels and lots of cops killed every year
BANG BANG BANG

62359526
if I have $1 and you have $0 i'm infinitely richer than you, are you going to kill me too? have fun in prison

62359983
>>62359451

Its all so tiresome

62360200
>>62359336

62360457

62360473
>>62359336

They're rich. They aren't dying. For enough money your own kids will defend them.

You're on /biz/
We like money.

item.title: Anyone else here all in VT? I feel like my hair has finally stopped finally stopped falling out — 13 replies — 52.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Anyone else here all in VT? I feel like my hair has finally stopped finally stopped falling out

Open thread • Replies: 13 • Updated: 2026-06-12 20:27 UTC

OP

Anyone else here all in VT? I feel like my hair has finally stopped finally stopped falling out

Early replies (first 3)

62357349
I’m like 80% VTI/VTSAX/whatever Fidelity’s S&P 500 fund is. the rest is in Apple that I bought before I knew about index funds.

62357428
>>62357306
you know your bonds will go down in value if rates go up?

62357471
>>62357428
VT is a 100% equity fund that contains no bonds

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62357483
Nah...the only thin worse than vt is a target fund. You buy al th shitty stocks in the world but at least your passing on 3rd woels bonds i guess. Even schd beats vt

62357524
>>62357483
I don't think the U.S. will dominate forever. I can't predict the future either, so rather just own the entire haystack instead of waste my time searching for tiny bits of better gains.

62357531
>>62357306
Yea. I only gamble with chump change and profits go into my boring VT stack. All Hail Jack Bogle

62357560
>>62357524
yeah, invest in nifty 500 and CSI 300 instead of that piece shit and piss 500.

62357587
>>62357524
Thats fine, but there are better funds than just buying everything.

62357627
>>62357587
There's always going to be something better, but the best to me is whatever will keep from tinkering with it, no panic selling, never abandoning it if it underperforms, just set and forget while I live my life with the lowest stress possible.

62357735
>>62357306
Honestly man, the final whitepill is that if you have a good savings rate, 100% into VT, and actually live your life to the fullest instead of looking at charts, you'll have made it without much stress. I guess you won't find most VT investors in places like /biz/, they're just not looking at the charts.

62357837
>>62357735
I still find /biz/ interesting and may throw a hail marry at some 100x opportunity to throw back into VT, but haven't seen anything show up since meme season a couple years ago or stuff like Chainlink before that. I'm pretty sure most feel a major gap hence the userbase here is like 10% of what it used to be.

62360556
>>62357531
We wouldn't have this board without him. Low cost index funds and free trades are because of him. Vanguard drug all the other brokerages kicking and screaming into the reality of no fee trading.

RIP Jack John Bogle.

His idea was that bogleheads is better than trading without the skill or just leaving your money in a savings account. be happy with better than nothing and skill the part where you pay some shit talker salesman half your profits.

62360568
>>62360556
Skip instead of skill.

EDIT

item.title: the fucking jeets my managers hired have fucked me over. — 56 replies — 40.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
the fucking jeets my managers hired have fucked me over.

Open thread • Replies: 56 • Updated: 2026-06-12 19:10 UTC

OP

the fucking jeets my managers hired have fucked me over. tamil fucks. they didnt put any data loggers as stipulated by sop into the fucking pallets they were packing and all the data loggers are fucking missing holy fuck
COO scheduled a meeting with me along with 3 different VP im so fucked holy fucking shit. 72 pallets of insulin is fucked. I only became head of APAC logistics 2 years ago fucks sake. I know they want to get rid of me, opportune. FUCK THIS.

Early replies (first 3)

62353920
>>62353896
you were too trusting. This is your mistake when you know they're trying to get rid of you. That's when you should have stepped up your game or started looking for a new job.

62353921
Im so sick of this. How is it my fault when they remove all my budget for manpower

62353940
>>62353896
they only know one type of log and its not the clean kind.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62354178
>>62354174
>I cant have 70 different warehouses sending me pics of pallets and shit fuckface
then they should be sending them to lower management and you should be checking in with them.

someone clearly fucked up and since it was your system that failed, you're going to get fired. Figure out a better system so stuff like that can't happen

62354186
>>62354101
>>62354164
They are on /pol/ being hypocrites nigger posting at the end of the day. Hardly here on /biz/ to have intelligent conversations.

62354187
>>62354176
>generally speaking the smartest people are the most liberal. Which is why we all think the same way, went to the same universities and hold identical opinions

62354223
>>62354187
are there any illiberal colleges?

62354238
>>62354223
Ones without huge humanities sections

62354322
Well keep us updated

62354335
>>62354101
Good riddance, fucks like you fleece US jobs.

62354336
>>62354176
I was very surprised when I heard Magnus Carlsen wasn't a conservative and Vitaliks political viewpoints always throw me for a loop

62354359
>>62354335
These warehouses are in asia you retard

62354363
>>62354223
Go to a red state and hope for the best.

62354369
I haven’t had many encounters with jeets yet, though my employer has outsourced a ton of work to one of these agencies (v.globant). they’ve also outsourced a ton to south america over the past year. last week I opened a jira ticket for an issue with an internal tool that was acknowledged and being worked on by one of the remaining whites. the next day one of the argentinians hijacked my ticket and edited it to be about an entirely separate bug for a different application. I have to assume he somehow doesn’t know how to create a jira ticket so just edited an existing one.

62354374
>>62353896
Just claim that youre a masculine presenting lesbian transvestite.

62354498
That’s just a log, you can fake a log with computer generated one and the boss can’t even tell it is falsified lmao you are naive little white bois being too nice.

62354858
>>62354174
it's your responsibility to ensure a positive outcome. the outcome is negative, therefore you failed. it's shrimple

62354952
>>62353921
As early as possible in this meeting, tell them it's a good thing you're here to being this to their attention. Otherwise this is the future of the company on the current trajectory. Convince them that this incident was a godsend. To fail brilliantly is to offer hope. To fail in darkness and in silence... That is certain doom.
That is why you are going to ask for TWICE the amount of funding you origin thought you needed.
Insurance will cover the jeet mistakes and the lesson here is invaluable. Congrats. You just promoted yourself to C suite. You are a true alchemist.

62354959
>>62354359
That’s kind of interesting.
Were you moving product from India itself?

62355003
>>62354186
Ya got me

62355018
>>62353896
JEETed

62355042
I’m so glad I started NEETING around 2014. Imagine if I had put in the effort to have a career and kids just to get rug pulled. I would KMS. Now I can enjoy the destruction.

62355166
>>62353896
Lemme tell you something bud, Brown people ain't shit. Everyone knows it. There was a time when everyone wanted to be in charge, to boss everyone around.. now I dont know anyone who wants a leadership position in my line of work. Nobody wants to be the poor unfortunate soul who has to tard-wrangle all these dark skinned whiny bitches. None of them give a fuck. Theyll walk right past something fucked up without ever mentioning it to the boss and it gets covered up and someone like me has to fix it. The people like me realize we're being slowly replaced and if its this bad when its like 50% white, I cant imagine when its my turn to be in charge and its 30% white. The blacks form little "mini-unions" where they all fuck off and if you have a problem with one of them fucking off then you have a problem with all of them fucking off, in my experience blacks are the laziest of all. I dont ever see jeets because theyre apparently even lazier than blacks because they dont take work jobs, they take delivery jobs where you get to sit down all day. I worked with one jew who was actually a really cool guy and a very good friend but one day he told me his sinagogue put him in a secret society called the freemasons and he wasnt even sure why he was in it. I dont like that. I dont like that jews are placed in secret societies in our countries when they come of age. I dont see asians at all in these positions so really they just need to stay in their own countries. Thats cool if they all want to be scientists and never build anything but they can go back to china and Japan and do that shit.

You dont want to be in charge of brown people and "me me me" people. You dont want to do the work of 6 fucking people, fuck surveillance, fuck always staying on these peoples ass, we need white people. We need more white people and less brown people.

62356510
>>62353896
Haha

62356526
>>62353940
Kek

62356539
>>62354101
Kek again
get fucked traitor

62356554
>>62355166
No one is reading all this in the age of AI slop

62356625
>>62353896
2 years into a new management position is still pretty new, especially if you have no prior management experience. They should use it as a coaching/learning opportunity and help you succeed instead of tearing you a new asshole, especially if they promoted you knowing you lack management experience. Also, being merciful to your employees generates goodwill among the employees and fosters a good work culture. Unfortunately if your company is run by boomers they are all insane greedy pigs with lead poisoning brain damage and no soul.

62356804
>>62354101
Well deserved I’d say. You get what you pay for

62359703
>>62353921
Clearly your team needs more jeets to fix the issues created by the other jeets

62359788
>>62354101
womp womp? why'd you do that...

62359822
During certain days of the year I have to speak to jeets on a daily basis and I hate it. Pearson book company is especially egregious about this, they've hired no one but jeets. Not only do I have to go through a minute and a half of telephone prompts, after I do that I get a jeet who claims his name is Michael, John, Joey, or Smith, and they ask me the SAME EXACT QUESTIONS I just answered on the telephone prompts but it's worse cause they can't spell and I need to spell everything out for them and then they repeat it back to me with mnemonics - A as in apple, B as in brown, C as in cat etc - and then they act stupid and keep pestering you with more questions until they wear you down.

62359966
>>62353896
fake, gay, etc

item.title: Elon is going to build a data center dAIson sphere around the sun — 17 replies — 39.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
Elon is going to build a data center dAIson sphere around the sun

Open thread • Replies: 17 • Updated: 2026-06-12 20:08 UTC

OP

Buy space exploration technologies company stock BUY BUY BUY

Early replies (first 3)

62359811
>>62359800
kek

62359825
>>62359800
will that thing cast a shadow on my backyard? my petunias need the sunlight

62359829
>>62359800
This may be controversial but I think we will see a Dyson Sphere within our lives.

Technology is exponential. Look how long we spent in the Dark Ages with basic mathematics and science then we hit the industrial revolution and in a few hundred of years we are here.

Now with the AI revolution things will happen even faster. Technology enables us to do things faster, better, and more efficiently. With AI we will be travelling between planets regularly in just a few decades.

It might sound crazy but so would a smart phone 200 years ago.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62359836
>>62359829
I hope not, it's terribly ugly. Futurists really don't seem to have any aesthetic sense whatsoever. What point is there in traveling to other planets if the people going there are hideous and uglify everything they touch?

62359837
When is Elon going to build a Mass Relay to the Citadel? I need some blue Asari ass

62359841
>space exploration technologies

62359842
>>62359829
Unless we get real Artificial Superintelligence soon you can forget about that.

62360179
>>62359841
inaneh compootah

62360249
>>62359800
Yes.

62360253
EDS trannies will literally say this is fake, but it's real and it's happening. 10,000 Starship launches per year by 2028, the dyson sphere is happening

62360297
>>62359800
kek

62360306
>>62359800
By 2027 none the less!!!!

62360337
They will build special space radiators of carbon and shit and lasers

62360362
>>62359800
Who's gonna build it? Mexicans?

62360396
>>62359836
its not about beauty, its about turning energy into compute

62360433
>>62359836
How often do you look at the sun

62360446
>>62360362

62359169

>>62359127
been trading for an hour. zero structural meaning. take your charts and shove em up your ass for the first month

62359199
>>62359169

cult

62359304
>>62359199
MACD is irrelevant right now because it's mathematically impossible to calculate a true trend until a stock has been trading for at least 60 to 90 days. like i said . take your charts and shove it up your ass

62359392
>>62359304
>There is no trend to follow!
>You can't use TA on a 1 day old shitter!
I don't care about whatever memestock /biz/ is having vaginal contractions from but I've heard this before and it just so happen that this other thing blew up to a multi hundred MC shitcoin. You're unironically making this IPO seem bullish.

62360363
>>62358041

>>62358263

62358375
>>62358276
Do niggers not understand basic money supply theory? If you think this shit will moon and do a 10x then you are a certified retarded

62358378
Doom sissies know nothing. $400 minimum.

62358411
>>62358320
That’s super low for a trending ipo debut

62358420
we're back

62358587
>>62358360
kek

62358609
>>62358360
>sold his 8 shares for 240$ profit
humble brag

62358614
2 lakh crore dollars
2 crore crore rupees

62360034
HERE IT COMES
TO THE MOON AND BACK

62360080
>>62358374
MAGA will just print more money.

item.title: (srs post) thoughts on my nostradamus'ing? Good? Meh? Dumb? — 17 replies — 12.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
(srs post) thoughts on my nostradamus'ing? Good? Meh? Dumb?

Open thread • Replies: 17 • Updated: 2026-06-12 19:14 UTC

OP

June 11: chop as market gets ready for pump on spacex trading day

June 12 - June 16: iran FUD is metabolized and market goes up on spacex


June 17 - June 22: FOMC on June 16 EOD causes fud, plus more iran fears

June 22 - Oct 10: NDQ floats upwards 40% while S&P chops and eventually goes up 10%

Oct 10: NDQ reaches a generational top - OpenAI IPOs - Fed announces more hikes due to AI labor inflation - republicans lose congress making trump a lame duck president = no more stimulus grift to pump markets
Oct 10, 2026 - ~Oct 10 2027: as a consequence of the lame duck presidency and the lack of stimulus and the selling of AI venture capital bags onto retail, S&P sells off 40% to round trip all the way back down to 5000

~Oct 10 2027: anthropic ipos

~Oct 10 2027 onwards: pretty much a new 20 year cycle begins and most likely the end of humanity as we birth sentience of machines.

Early replies (first 3)

62349969
you need to factor in the wc which is the biggest npc bread & circus event in modern history

62349972
>>62349960
i just matched up the timelines for 1973 and 2000 btw, that's where I'm getting the play by play for things. I reckon the trading AI's are probably averaging the two together given the macro environment

62349980
>>62349969
ah good point, ya so that might erase the june 17 - june 22 fud period and we go straight into june 22 - oct 10 period

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62350015
>>62349960
Eh. I think they'll just turn shit up to 11 because Bank of America lost.

62352238
biz, so far my prediction is working, stop posting on 1pbtid pepe threads, and let me know if my predictions are shit or not

62353716
snailposting this shit since you retards only want to respond to 1pbtid's

62353764
>>62353716
It'll be a lost decade. It'll take 5-7 years for first new nuclear reactors to come online to unclog the the backlog of ai data centers that will be getting shit canned later this year or next after the crash.

Commodities will be the main play. World needs real resources to build infrastructure and robots. Shit doesn't mine itself out of the ground.

62353866
>>62353764
thanks, yea, seems to be that way. Right around 1973 market peak to 1975ish, gold picked up a 2x bid, so I imagine other commodities would follow suit

It's hard to imagine though, because I look around and I still to this day don't see labor inflation, yet everyone is speaking about how all this build out is happening. If it's happening, why doesn't it show up in labor? That's the first bottleneck that'll show up, no? It showed up in 08, are we saying all the mining and manufacturing just simply doesn't require that many humans? That seems a little bit farfetched to me

62355245
>>62349960
elf

62359675
snailposting this shit since you retards only want to respond to 1pbtid's x2

62359708
Sex with Frieren

62359749
>>62359675
what do you want to hear? the market will go up or go down. your doom pronouncement is stupid since people have been predicting the apocalypse for thousands of years and have always been wrong. also LLMs are gay and AI companies deserve to be buried in piracy and antitrust lawsuits by the next administration. I hope every AI ceo ends up in jail

62359780
>>62359708
Sex with this anon

62359931
>>62359749
fuck yourself, im gonna keep snailposting till you retards give me some concrete nostradamus dates and counter reasoning exactly like you retards do on the 1pbtid pepe threads

62359962
Line will continue up until 7/4/28
7*4 = 28 and they get the satisfaction of destroying a holiday. Will also hand everything to the dems in the next election.

62359991
>>62349960
This is now a Flielen thread

62359998
>>62359991
